The mode to open the file with. Opens on default.
The mode to access the file with.
The mode to share the file with.
member.returns: Whether or not the file could be found.

The mode to open the file with. Opens on default.
The mode to access the file with.
The mode to share the file with.
member.returns: Whether or not the file could be found.

member.name: T:SlopperEngine.Core.Mods.ModPermissionFlags
member.summary: Rules for what a SlopperMod's code is allowed to do.

member.name: F:SlopperEngine.Core.Mods.ModPermissionFlags.None
member.summary: The mod can't do anything. No code will be loaded.

member.name: F:SlopperEngine.Core.Mods.ModPermissionFlags.Default
member.summary: The mod is allowed to read and write its own files, modify existing scenes, and add its own code.

member.name: F:SlopperEngine.Core.Mods.ModPermissionFlags.ManageScenes
member.summary: The mod is allowed to create, activate, and deactivate scenes.

member.name: F:SlopperEngine.Core.Mods.ModPermissionFlags.ManageOtherModFiles
member.summary: The mod is allowed to read and write files of other SlopperMods (if they have less or equal permissions).

member.name: F:SlopperEngine.Core.Mods.ModPermissionFlags.AccessNetwork
member.summary: The mod is allowed to access the internet.

member.name: F:SlopperEngine.Core.Mods.ModPermissionFlags.AccessOtherMods
member.summary: The mod is allowed to access code from mods (with less or equal permissions).

member.name: F:SlopperEngine.Core.Mods.ModPermissionFlags.ManageMods
member.summary: The mod is allowed to load and unload mods (with less or equal permissions).

member.name: F:SlopperEngine.Core.Mods.ModPermissionFlags.Unrestricted
member.summary: The mod has complete and unrestricted access to any code and the engine.

member.name: F:SlopperEngine.Core.Mods.ModPermissionFlags.All
member.summary: All flags set to true.
